title: Ligurian Kipper Pasta
description: A simple yet flavorful pasta dish featuring kippers and a tangy Ligurian sauce.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a separate pan, heat the Ligurian olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the kipper fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until cooked through.
Remove the kipper from the pan and set aside.
Add the cooked pasta to the pan with the garlic and oil. Toss to combine.
Add the fresh parsley, salt, and black pepper to the pasta and toss to combine.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the pasta and toss to combine.
Serve the pasta with the kipper fillets on top.
